parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const sceneType = $env.GITHUB_RADAR_TARGET_SCENE_TYPE || $env.GITHUB_WEEKLY_TARGET_SCENE_TYPE || 'group'; const sceneId = $env.GITHUB_RADAR_TARGET_SCENE_ID || $env.GITHUB_WEEKLY_TARGET_SCENE_ID; return { target: { platform: 'qq', scene_type: sceneType, scene_id: sceneId }, content: { type: 'text', text: $json.text }, source: 'n8n:github_project_radar', idempotency_key: `github-project-radar:${$json.data.weekKey}:${sceneType}:${sceneId}`, metadata: { workflow: 'github_project_radar', reportDate: $json.data.reportDate, weekKey: $json.data.weekKey, activeSince: $json.data.activeSince, q: $json.metadata.q } }; })() }}
